actions.value: The most impressive thing I've built is the AI-Assisted Job Application Automation Platform (launchway.app). I personally architected a robust 3-layer form-filling system and integrated AI for resume tailoring and job relevance ranking. The hardest technical challenge was developing the Playwright-based ATS automation to reliably navigate and accurately populate diverse, dynamic forms, while also ensuring human-in-the-loop safeguards. This involved complex parsing, mapping, and error recovery logic for maximum success rate across varied platforms. As a result, the platform processed over 650 applications for 12 beta users, achieving an 86% field-population success rate and reducing application time by approximately 87%, saving users ~12 minutes per application.
